name: @venomzen/pi-web-access-enhanced
description_en: Personal enhanced fork of pi-web-access: web search, content extraction, GitHub repo cloning, PDF extraction, YouTube and local video analysis for Pi coding agent
description_zh: pi-web-access 的个人增强版分支：网络搜索、内容提取、GitHub 仓库克隆、PDF 提取、YouTube 和本地视频分析，适用于 Pi 编码代理
